data.summary: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement of pre-filling from previous submissions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pre-filling from previous submissions, but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for pre-filling but lacks concrete evidence of its existence or operation, leading to an inconclusive status. The absence of specific API reads or persisted state checks further contributes to the inability to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of pre-fill from previous submissions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
